LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HOSUN YOO MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JOHN EVAN HEMINGWAY. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. THE 3/3/2010 LETTER WAS NOT AN ABSOLUTE AND UNQUALIFIED ACCEPTANCE OF DEFENDANT'S OFFER. BIAS VS. WRIGHT (2002) 103 CAL.APP. 4TH 811. (DEFENSE COUNSEL WILL PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER.) Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HOSUN YOO Motion for Entry of Judgment against defendant John Evan Hemingway. Appearances: Demian I. Okesenendler, Esq. Mannion & Lowe, (415) 733-1050 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; Anthony Clark Deichler, Esq. Trembath, Deichler & Hermanson LLP (925) 600-0900 appearing for Defendant and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. The 3/3/2010 letter was not an absolute and unqualified acceptance of defendant's offer. Bias vs. Wright (2002) 103 Cal.App. 4th 811. (Defense counsel will prepare proposed Order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
